prompt: Generate a 1:1 ratio hyper-realistic smartphone candid photo. A pretty East Asian woman in her twenties is sitting in a warm and quiet Japanese restaurant eating noodles, leaning slightly forward and looking directly at the camera. She has a naturally delicate oval face, fair and realistic skin, large dark brown eyes, and light blush; long straight dark brown hair draped over her shoulders, with light, slightly messy air bangs on her forehead, wearing a simple dark gray short-sleeved top. Focus on restoring her expression: eyes slightly widened, gaze quietly and intently looking at the camera; lips lightly pursed, corners of the mouth only slightly upturned, cheeks slightly puffed, as if she just finished a bite of noodles and suddenly noticed a friend taking a picture of her, with a shy, gentle, and slightly suppressed smile. No toothy grins, no exaggerated expressions. One hand naturally holds black chopsticks, suspended above the noodle bowl. In the center of the table is a large black ceramic bowl with thick noodles, seaweed, mushrooms, and vegetables, and to the left is a light-colored milk drink with ice cubes and a black straw. The background consists of beige walls and black wooden lattice windows, with a slight cool blue light showing behind the windows. A friend is sitting across the table shooting with a smartphone, slightly high angle, with the upper body, noodle bowl, and drink fully in the frame. Realistic skin texture, natural facial proportions, slight smartphone wide-angle feel, ordinary restaurant lighting, casual composition, slight noise, no studio feel, no skin smoothing, no anime style, no text or watermarks.
promptEn: Generate a 1:1 ratio hyper-realistic smartphone candid photo. A pretty East Asian woman in her twenties is sitting in a warm and quiet Japanese restaurant eating noodles, leaning slightly forward and looking directly at the camera. She has a naturally delicate oval face, fair and realistic skin, large dark brown eyes, and light blush; long straight dark brown hair draped over her shoulders, with light, slightly messy air bangs on her forehead, wearing a simple dark gray short-sleeved top. Focus on restoring her expression: eyes slightly widened, gaze quietly and intently looking at the camera; lips lightly pursed, corners of the mouth only slightly upturned, cheeks slightly puffed, as if she just finished a bite of noodles and suddenly noticed a friend taking a picture of her, with a shy, gentle, and slightly suppressed smile. No toothy grins, no exaggerated expressions. One hand naturally holds black chopsticks, suspended above the noodle bowl. In the center of the table is a large black ceramic bowl with thick noodles, seaweed, mushrooms, and vegetables, and to the left is a light-colored milk drink with ice cubes and a black straw. The background consists of beige walls and black wooden lattice windows, with a slight cool blue light showing behind the windows. A friend is sitting across the table shooting with a smartphone, slightly high angle, with the upper body, noodle bowl, and drink fully in the frame. Realistic skin texture, natural facial proportions, slight smartphone wide-angle feel, ordinary restaurant lighting, casual composition, slight noise, no studio feel, no skin smoothing, no anime style, no text or watermarks.
promptZh: 生成一张 1:1 比例的超写实手机抓拍照。一位 二十多岁漂亮的东亚女性 坐在 温馨安静的日式餐厅 里吃面，身体微微前倾，直视镜头。她有着天生精致的鹅蛋脸，皮肤白皙且真实，深棕色的大眼睛，带着淡淡的腮红；长直的深棕色头发披在肩上，额前留着轻盈、略显凌乱的空气刘海，身穿一件 简约的深灰色短袖上衣。重点还原她的表情：双眼微睁，目光安静而专注地注视着镜头；双唇轻抿，嘴角微微上扬，脸颊微鼓，仿佛刚吃完一口面，突然发现朋友正在给自己拍照，流露出羞涩、温柔且略带克制的微笑。不要露齿笑，不要夸张的表情。一只手自然地拿着黑色筷子，悬在面碗上方。桌子中央是一个黑色大瓷碗，里面装着粗面条、海苔、蘑菇和蔬菜，左侧放着一杯带有冰块和黑色吸管的浅色奶茶。背景是米色的墙壁和黑色木质格栅窗，窗后透出微微的冷蓝色光线。对面坐着一位朋友正用手机拍摄，视角略高，上半身、面碗和饮料完整入镜。真实的皮肤纹理，自然的五官比例，轻微的手机广角感，普通的餐厅照明，随意的构图，轻微的噪点，无影棚感，无磨皮，非动漫风格，无文字或水印。
